sentence: 他对手机游戏成瘾，每天玩好几小时。
pinyin: Tā duì shǒujī yóuxì chéngyǐn, měitiān wán hǎo jǐ xiǎoshí.
english: He is addicted to mobile games and plays for several hours every day.

meaning: 1. to rely on sb for support
sentence: 公司在这个项目上借重他的专业经验。
pinyin: Gōngsī zài zhège xiàngmù shàng jièzhòng tā de zhuānyè jīngyàn.
english: The company relies on his professional expertise for this project.

sentence: 那片沙漠是真正的无人区，没有水源。
pinyin: Nà piàn shāmò shì zhēnzhèng de wúrénqū, méiyǒu shuǐyuán.
english: That desert is a true uninhabited region with no water source.

sentence: 这本书卖得很好，版税收入相当可观。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū mài de hěn hǎo, bǎnshuì shōurù xiāngdāng kěguān.
english: This book sells very well, and the royalty income is quite substantial.

sentence: 金属受热后会发生形变。
pinyin: Jīnshǔ shòurè hòu huì fāshēng xíngbiàn.
english: Metal undergoes deformation when heated.

sentence: 公司制定了明确的奖惩制度。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhìdìng le míngquè de jiǎngchéng zhìdù.
english: The company established a clear rewards and penalties system.

sentence: 学外语不光要学词汇，还要学句法。
pinyin: Xué wàiyǔ bù guāng yào xué cíhuì, hái yào xué jùfǎ.
english: Learning a foreign language requires not just vocabulary but also syntax.

meaning: 1. to forge; 2. fake; 3. to fabricate (a story)
sentence: 他假造了一份学历证书来应聘。
pinyin: Tā jiǎzào le yī fèn xuélì zhèngshū lái yìngpìn.
english: He forged an academic credential to apply for the job.

meaning: 1. that very night; 2. the same night
sentence: 他们当夜就赶回了家。
pinyin: Tāmen dāngyè jiù gǎn huí le jiā.
english: They hurried back home that very night.

sentence: 书后面的附录里有详细的参考资料。
pinyin: Shū hòumiàn de fùlù lǐ yǒu xiángxì de cānkǎo zīliào.
english: The appendix at the back of the book contains detailed reference materials.

sentence: 油炸食品好吃，但吃多了对身体不好。
pinyin: Yóuzhá shípǐn hǎochī, dàn chī duō le duì shēntǐ bù hǎo.
english: Deep-fried food tastes great, but eating too much is bad for your health.

sentence: 他小时候用气枪打过靶，成绩还不错。
pinyin: Tā xiǎoshíhou yòng qìqiāng dǎguo bǎ, chéngjì hái búcuò.
english: He used to shoot targets with an air gun as a kid and got decent scores.

meaning: subsistence allowance; welfare (abbr. for 城市居民最低生活保障[cheng2 shi4 ju1 m
sentence: 他失业后申请了低保，靠政府补贴维持生活。
pinyin: Tā shīyè hòu shēnqǐng le dībǎo, kào zhèngfǔ bǔtiē wéichí shēnghuó.
english: After losing his job, he applied for the subsistence allowance and relied on government subsidies to get by.

sentence: 他在居酒屋点了一杯清酒。
pinyin: Tā zài jū jiǔ wū diǎn le yī bēi qīng jiǔ.
english: He ordered a glass of sake at the izakaya.

sentence: 该国正在推行币制改革。
pinyin: Gāi guó zhèngzài tuīxíng bì zhì gǎigé.
english: The country is pushing forward with currency system reform.

sentence: 今天北风很大，出门要多穿点。
pinyin: Jīntiān běi fēng hěn dà, chū mén yào duō chuān diǎn.
english: The north wind is really strong today — wear more layers when you go out.

sentence: 这位民选市长上任后立刻推行改革。
pinyin: Zhè wèi mín xuǎn shì zhǎng shàngrèn hòu lìkè tuīxíng gǎigé.
english: The democratically elected mayor immediately pushed for reforms after taking office.

meaning: to transfer (a patient) to a different hospital; to transfer to hospit
sentence: 病情严重，医生建议他转院治疗。
pinyin: Bìngqíng yánzhòng, yīshēng jiànyì tā zhuǎn yuàn zhìliáo.
english: His condition was serious, so the doctor recommended transferring him to another hospital.

meaning: (slang) to hook up for sex; to arrange a casual sexual encounter (ofte
sentence: 他在交友软件上约炮，结果遇到了骗子。
pinyin: Tā zài jiāoyǒu ruǎnjiàn shàng yuē pào, jiéguǒ yùdào le piànzi.
english: He tried to hook up through a dating app and ended up meeting a scammer.

meaning: public; publicly (owned, financed, operated etc); run by the state
sentence: 这家公营医院的收费比较低。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōng yíng yīyuàn de shōufèi bǐjiào dī.
english: This public hospital charges relatively lower fees.

sentence: 他在资格赛中表现出色，顺利晋级。
pinyin: Tā zài zī gé sài zhōng biǎoxiàn chūsè, shùnlì jìnjí.
english: He performed brilliantly in the qualifying round and advanced smoothly.

sentence: 古时候，进京师是很多人的梦想。
pinyin: Gǔ shíhou, jìn jīng shī shì hěn duō rén de mèngxiǎng.
english: In ancient times, going to the capital was the dream of many people.

sentence: 那场学运影响了整整一代年轻人。
pinyin: Nà chǎng xué yùn yǐngxiǎng le zhěngzhěng yī dài niánqīngrén.
english: That student movement influenced an entire generation of young people.

sentence: 市政府加固了河堤以加强防洪能力。
pinyin: Shì zhèngfǔ jiāgù le hé dī yǐ jiāqiáng fáng hóng nénglì.
english: The city government reinforced the riverbanks to improve flood control capacity.

sentence: 狮子被称为动物界的王者。
pinyin: Shīzi bèi chēngwéi dòng wù jiè de wángzhě.
english: The lion is known as the king of the animal kingdom.

sentence: 医生给他开了预防性的药物。
pinyin: Yīshēng gěi tā kāi le yù fáng xìng de yàowù.
english: The doctor prescribed him preventive medication.

meaning: (of a married woman) to cheat on her husband; to have an affair
sentence: 邻居发现她在偷人，闹得满城风雨。
pinyin: Línjū fāxiàn tā zài tōu rén, nào de mǎn chéng fēng yǔ.
english: The neighbors found out she was having an affair, and it caused a huge scandal.

sentence: 这台洗衣机内置微电脑控制系统。
pinyin: Zhè tái xǐyījī nèizhì wēi diàn nǎo kòngzhì xìtǒng.
english: This washing machine has a built-in microcomputer control system.

sentence: 他在一家知名券商工作，专门做股票分析。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā zhīmíng quàn shāng gōngzuò, zhuānmén zuò gǔpiào fēnxī.
english: He works at a well-known securities dealer specializing in stock analysis.

meaning: to do sth on behalf of sb else
sentence: 他不在，我可以代为签收快递。
pinyin: Tā bù zài, wǒ kěyǐ dài wéi qiān shōu kuàidì.
english: He's not here — I can sign for the delivery on his behalf.

meaning: the Emperor's body; Jesus' body; communion wafer (in Christian mass)
sentence: 信徒在弥撒中领受圣体。
pinyin: Xìntú zài mísā zhōng lǐngshòu shèng tǐ.
english: Believers receive communion during Mass.

meaning: pure love; BL, aka boys' love (genre of male homoerotic fictional medi
sentence: 这部小说描写了两个人之间的纯爱故事。
pinyin: Zhè bù xiǎoshuō miáoxiě le liǎng gè rén zhījiān de chún ài gùshi.
english: This novel tells a story of pure love between two people.

meaning: to be popular; to be in luck; to have good luck; to develop smoothly
sentence: 她发布的短视频一夜之间走红网络。
pinyin: Tā fābù de duǎn shìpín yī yè zhī jiān zǒu hóng wǎngluò.
english: The short video she posted went viral online overnight.

sentence: 糖尿病患者每天都需要注射胰岛素。
pinyin: Tángniàobìng huànzhě měitiān dōu xūyào zhùshè yí dǎo sù.
english: Diabetes patients need to inject insulin every day.

sentence: 今晚的篮球比赛在市中心的球馆举行。
pinyin: Jīn wǎn de lánqiú bǐsài zài shì zhōngxīn de qiú guǎn jǔxíng.
english: Tonight's basketball game is being held at the arena in the city center.

meaning: to cry out in ecstasy (during lovemaking)
sentence: 她觉得电影里那段叫床声太夸张了。
pinyin: Tā juéde diànyǐng lǐ nà duàn jiào chuáng shēng tài kuāzhāng le.
english: She thought the moaning sounds in that movie scene were way over the top.

sentence: 公民有权自由结社，组成各类团体。
pinyin: Gōngmín yǒu quán zìyóu jié shè, zǔchéng gè lèi tuántǐ.
english: Citizens have the right to freely form associations and organizations of all kinds.

sentence: "躺平"是这两年最流行的流行语之一。
pinyin: "Tǎng píng" shì zhè liǎng nián zuì liúxíng de liú xíng yǔ zhī yī.
english: "Lying flat" is one of the most popular catchwords of the past two years.

meaning: to commence employment; to enter a company
sentence: 他下周一正式入职新公司。
pinyin: Tā xià zhōu yī zhèngshì rù zhí xīn gōngsī.
english: He officially starts at his new company next Monday.

sentence: 《独立宣言》是美国历史上的重要文件。
pinyin: 《Dú lì xuān yán》 shì Měiguó lìshǐ shàng de zhòngyào wénjiàn.
english: The Declaration of Independence is a landmark document in American history.

meaning: judge's desk; complex legal case; contentious issue; koan (Zen Buddhis
sentence: 这起悬案成了当地的一大公案，多年未解。
pinyin: Zhè qǐ xuán àn chéng le dāngdì de yī dà gōng àn, duō nián wèi jiě.
english: This unsolved case became a major local mystery that went unresolved for years.

sentence: 他是体育界公认的传奇人物。
pinyin: Tā shì tǐ yù jiè gōngrèn de chuánqí rénwù.
english: He is a widely recognized legend in the sporting world.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了一具完整的鱼龙化石。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le yī jù wánzhěng de yú lóng huàshí.
english: The museum has a complete ichthyosaur fossil on display.

sentence: 他用火柴点燃了蜡烛。
pinyin: Tā yòng huǒchái diǎnrán le làzhú.
english: He lit the candle with a match.

meaning: cannot bear not; be dying to
sentence: 天气这么热，我恨不得跳进游泳池。
pinyin: Tiānqì zhème rè, wǒ hèn bù dé tiào jìn yóuyǒngchí.
english: It's so hot I'm itching to jump into a swimming pool.

sentence: 这枚戒指上镶嵌着一颗钻石。
pinyin: Zhè méi jièzhi shàng xiāngqiàn zhe yī kē zuànshí.
english: This ring has a diamond set in it.

meaning: as soon as possible; at the earliest possible time
sentence: 感冒了要及早去看医生，别拖着。
pinyin: Gǎnmào le yào jí zǎo qù kàn yīshēng, bié tuō zhe.
english: If you have a cold, see a doctor as soon as possible — don't put it off.

sentence: 傍晚的海风让人感觉清凉。
pinyin: Bàngwǎn de hǎifēng ràng rén gǎnjué qīngliáng.
english: The evening sea breeze feels cool and refreshing.

sentence: 她从小就开始学芭蕾。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù kāishǐ xué bālěi.
english: She started learning ballet when she was young.

sentence: 她用棉花填充枕头，做好了一个。
pinyin: Tā yòng mián huā tián chōng zhěn tou, zuò hǎo le yí gè.
english: She stuffed a pillow with cotton and finished making it.
